name: api-design
description: REST API design: resource naming, status-code discipline, pagination/filtering/sorting conventions, versioning strategy, RFC 9457 error format, idempotency, Laravel API Resources, plus a graphql-grpc skill for non-REST surfaces (DataLoader, resolver authz, proto field-number safety, streaming). Includes /api-design:review and /api-design:scaffold (spec-first: OpenAPI → Laravel routes/FormRequests/Resources). Defers third-party API docs to api-docs-first.
